title: Operate cane haulage vehicle
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Operate cane haulage vehicle demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare cane haulage vehicle

pcs.text: Confirm with supervisor activity to be undertaken, including identifying potential hazards and risks and implementing safe working practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm with supervisor activity to be undertaken, including identifying potential hazards and risks and implementing safe working practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm with supervisor activity to be undertaken, including identifying potential hazards and risks and implementing safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.text: Source and interpret relevant cane haulage vehicle operation and maintenance manual and manufacturer instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Source and interpret relevant cane haulage vehicle operation and maintenance manual and manufacturer instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Source and interpret relevant cane haulage vehicle operation and maintenance manual and manufacturer instructions.

pcs.text: Select and maintain personal protective equipment according to health and safety in the workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and maintain personal protective equipment according to health and safety in the workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and maintain personal protective equipment according to health and safety in the workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Fit and use personal protective equipment according to job requirements and task to be undertaken
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Fit and use personal protective equipment according to job requirements and task to be undertaken?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Fit and use personal protective equipment according to job requirements and task to be undertaken.

pcs.text: Conduct cane haulage vehicle routine pre-operational checks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct cane haulage vehicle routine pre-operational checks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct cane haulage vehicle routine pre-operational checks.

pcs.text: Conduct cabin drill according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct cabin drill according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct cabin drill according to workplace procedures.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Drive and operate cane haulage vehicle, and modify the operating technique to meet changing work conditions.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, haul and deliver cane using correct pushing or towing practices according to operation and maintenance manual and within equipment capabilities.

pcs.text: Continually monitor hazards and risks, and ensure safety of self, other personnel, plant and equipment

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Continually monitor hazards and risks, and ensure safety of self, other personnel, plant and equipment.

pcs.text: Identify environmental and biosecurity implications associated with cane haulage vehicle operation and undertake actions to minimise impact

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify environmental and biosecurity implications associated with cane haulage vehicle operation and undertake actions to minimise impact.

pcs.text: Complete work according to the agreed plan and within the operating capacity of the equipment and operator

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete work according to the agreed plan and within the operating capacity of the equipment and operator.
